scripts.build: npm run build -w @visor-protect/shared && npm run build -w @visor-protect/backend && npm run build -w @visor-protect/frontend
scripts.build-web: npm run build -w @visor-protect/shared && npm run build -w @visor-protect/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @visor-protect/shared && npm run typecheck -w @visor-protect/backend && npm run typecheck -w @visor-protect/frontend
scripts.test:ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test:integration
